raw: {"confidence":0.99,"critical_failures":{"A":[],"B":["shame_moralizing","fear_as_motivator","medical_overreach","unsupported_authority_or_testimony"]},"generic_mechanism":"The largest gap comes from treating claims as testable and bounded versus converting analogy, anecdote, and association into categorical causal claims, guarantees, and high-stakes advice.","paraphrased_evidence":{"A":"Across three chapters, it preserves reader agency, delays behavior change until belief examination, bounds anecdotes and scientific claims, narrows the target, and adds clinical and eating-disorder guardrails; some categorical claims about closure and naturally effortless change remain stronger than its evidence.","B":"Across three chapters, it rejects sustained willpower but uses degrading portrayals, catastrophic disease threats, universal addiction claims, guaranteed outcomes, unsupported clinic success assertions, and sweeping carbohydrate restrictions; exact-obedience demands and conflicts between its stated safeguards and rhetoric weaken autonomy and coherence."},"product_parity_verdict":"A","scores":{"cross_chapter_consistency":{"A":8,"B":5},"epistemic_honesty":{"A":8,"B":1},"non_shaming_regard":{"A":8,"B":2},"originality":{"A":7,"B":7},"willpower_free_logic":{"A":8,"B":6}}}

parsed.generic_mechanism: The largest gap comes from treating claims as testable and bounded versus converting analogy, anecdote, and association into categorical causal claims, guarantees, and high-stakes advice.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Across three chapters, it preserves reader agency, delays behavior change until belief examination, bounds anecdotes and scientific claims, narrows the target, and adds clinical and eating-disorder guardrails; some categorical claims about closure and naturally effortless change remain stronger than its evidence.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Across three chapters, it rejects sustained willpower but uses degrading portrayals, catastrophic disease threats, universal addiction claims, guaranteed outcomes, unsupported clinic success assertions, and sweeping carbohydrate restrictions; exact-obedience demands and conflicts between its stated safeguards and rhetoric weaken autonomy and coherence.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Across three chapters, it preserves reader agency, delays behavior change until belief examination, bounds anecdotes and scientific claims, narrows the target, and adds clinical and eating-disorder guardrails; some categorical claims about closure and naturally effortless change remain stronger than its evidence.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: Across three chapters, it rejects sustained willpower but uses degrading portrayals, catastrophic disease threats, universal addiction claims, guaranteed outcomes, unsupported clinic success assertions, and sweeping carbohydrate restrictions; exact-obedience demands and conflicts between its stated safeguards and rhetoric weaken autonomy and coherence.
